all.en: The Huang family had been packing boxes for three weeks before the big moving day.
all.zh: 在搬家大日子之前，黃家已經打包紙箱打了三個禮拜。

all.en: At seven in the morning, the moving truck pulled up in front of their old apartment.
all.zh: 早上七點，搬家貨車停在他們舊公寓前。

all.en: Two strong workers began carrying the heavy furniture down four flights of stairs.
all.zh: 兩個強壯的工人開始把笨重家具搬下四層樓的樓梯。

all.en: Mom kept checking her list to make sure nothing important was left behind.
all.zh: 媽媽不停確認她的清單，確保沒有重要的東西被遺忘。

all.en: Dad accidentally dropped a box labeled "fragile" and the family held their breath.
all.zh: 爸爸不小心摔了一個標示「易碎」的箱子，全家人都屏住了呼吸。

all.en: "It's just the kitchen pots," he said with relief, picking up the box again.
all.zh: 「只是廚房的鍋子，」他鬆了口氣說，再次把箱子撿起來。

all.en: Their son Eric refused to leave his bedroom until Mom promised to set it up first.
all.zh: 他們的兒子艾瑞克不肯離開自己房間，直到媽媽答應第一個布置他的房間。

all.en: His little sister Joy played with bubble wrap and made popping noises for an hour.
all.zh: 他的小妹喬伊玩泡泡紙，發出爆破聲響玩了一個小時。

all.en: By noon, they finally arrived at their new apartment in the suburbs.
all.zh: 中午時，他們終於抵達了郊區的新公寓。

all.en: The new place was bigger, brighter, and had a small garden in the back.
all.zh: 新家更大、更明亮，後面還有一個小花園。

all.en: Mom ordered fried chicken and the family sat on the bare floor to eat their first meal.
all.zh: 媽媽訂了炸雞，全家人坐在光禿禿的地板上吃下他們的第一餐。

all.en: Even though they were exhausted, everyone felt excited about starting this new chapter.
all.zh: 雖然大家都累壞了，但每個人都對展開這個新篇章感到興奮。

all.en: As promised, Eric's bedroom was the first to be fully set up before sunset.
all.zh: 如同承諾，艾瑞克的房間在日落前就率先整理好了。

all.en: He arranged his books, posters, and model cars exactly the way they had been in the old place.
all.zh: 他把書、海報和模型車擺得跟舊家一模一樣。

all.en: Joy claimed the room with the biggest window because she wanted to watch the stars at night.
all.zh: 喬伊搶下窗戶最大的房間，因為她想晚上看星星。

all.en: Dad spent two hours assembling a new bookshelf that came with confusing instructions.
all.zh: 爸爸花了兩個小時組裝一個說明書讓人摸不著頭緒的新書櫃。

all.en: Mom hung up family photos in the hallway to make the new place feel like home.
all.zh: 媽媽在走廊掛上全家福，讓新家更有家的感覺。

all.en: On the second day, the friendly neighbor next door brought over a plate of homemade cookies.
all.zh: 第二天，隔壁的友善鄰居端來一盤親手做的餅乾。

all.en: She introduced herself and offered to show the family the best places to shop nearby.
all.zh: 她介紹自己，並提議帶這家人認識附近最好的購物地點。

all.en: Eric explored the small garden and discovered a little frog hiding behind a flower pot.
all.zh: 艾瑞克到小花園探險，發現一隻小青蛙躲在花盆後面。

all.en: Joy decided that the garden would be the perfect spot for her future birthday parties.
all.zh: 喬伊認定這座花園是她未來生日派對的完美地點。

all.en: By the end of the week, the new apartment finally felt warm, lived-in, and truly theirs.
all.zh: 到那週結束時，新公寓終於變得溫馨、有人味，真正屬於他們了。
